## Problem Statement

What long-term workflow or current limitation does this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected behavior or command UX.

## Why This Helps

How does this improve process tracking, recording, or referencing?

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives did you evaluate?

## Additional Context

Add examples, sketches, or prior discussion links.
